name: Persimmon Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the persimmons well and remove the stem.
2. Place the washed persimmons in a blender, with or without skins, to make pulp.
3. Mix together all dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, ground cloves) except for sugar in a bowl.
4. Add chocolate chips, chopped walnuts, and chopped dates to the dry ingredients. Stir until everything is well coated.
5. Cream together the sugar, shortening, and egg in another bowl.
6. Add the persimmons to the mixture of sugar, shortening, and egg.
7. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared dough, stirring until fully blended.
9. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a buttered cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Gather the ingredients and prepare them as directed. Follow the instructions step by step, ensuring each component is combined properly before moving on to the next stage. Enjoy your delicious persimmon chocolate chip cookies!
